reviews_data.review_text: The best coffee I’ve had in Charlotte maybe ever! Their menu is so unique, there’s something for everyone. The staff is also so sweet and attentive.

Fantastic bevs and the staff are so nice and welcoming. Little Wave roastery (beans) are my favorite and the staff knows how to make ‘em shine in the custom coffee drinks. Equal parts excited about the Americano and the dirty sodas!
Love it here! The vibes are off the chart! Brown sugar cardamom dirty soda with Dr Pepper? Say less I’m omw! Staff is so nice and hospitable!
Plot Twist is an absolute Home Run! The vibe is incredible, the drinks are top tier, and the staff is genuinely warm and welcoming. Definitely going to be a regular at this awesome new spot!

What a cool spot! Delicious coffee and lots of options to customize or try something interesting. Great atmosphere with comfortable sofas, table and bar seating. The owner is involved and cares about customer experience.
They don’t accept cash, but I will come back!

Plot Twist is a hidden gem! The coffee is top-tier, and the cocktail menu is just as impressive. What really makes it special are the owners, they are genuinely amazing people who create an awesome vibe. Definitely worth checking out!
Such a lovely space with great coffee!
This was one of the coolest coffee cocktail bars I’ve been too. An amazing vibe! And on top of it - the coffee was one of the best I’ve ever had! So creative! Can’t wait to go back often!!
Gorgeous place, friendly staff and delicious espresso. Can't wait to see their cocktail options in a few weeks!

My wife dragged me here. But I ended up having a great time. Coffee was nice and the space is comfortable. Ended up getting a decent amount of reading done. The staff never stopped working hard to get all the orders out. Definitely will be willing to get dragged back here in the future.

Breathtaking new coffee and mixed drinks spot in Plaza Midwood!  From the moment you step in you will know that this is the perfect place to catch up with friends and/or read a great book.   We loved trying their inventive drinks menu (particularly their Ube Latte) almost as much as we were wowed by the friendly staff, inventive decor and cozy vibe. We have already been twice - and are sure to be back soon.
